author: nimaapr
description: Render HTML code blocks as live sandboxed previews, open HTML files in a custom view, and smartly handle HTML paste. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: nimaap
manifest.description: Render HTML code blocks as live sandboxed previews, open HTML files in a custom view, and smartly handle HTML paste.
manifest.name: Polyglot Renderer

name: Polyglot Renderer

releases.author: Nimaapr
releases.description:
## What's new

### Features
- **Scroll position persistence in the HTML file view** — switching tabs or restarting Obsidian brings you back to where you left off. (#16, #17)
- **Find in document** — press `Ctrl/Cmd+F` in the HTML file view to search the rendered content, with match highlighting, a match counter, and `Enter` / `Shift+Enter` to move between results. Only visible text is matched. (#19)
- **App shortcuts work from inside rendered HTML** — hotkeys such as `Ctrl+Tab` now reach Obsidian even while focus is inside the sandboxed content. (#18)

### Security
- **Hardened iframe sandboxing** — rendered HTML now runs in a fully opaque origin (`allow-scripts` without `allow-same-origin`), so rendered content cannot reach Obsidian, the vault, or the file system. External links are restricted to `http:`/`https:`. Thanks @LooselySupervised! (#14)
- postMessage handlers now only honour messages coming from the plugin's own frames. (#20)

### Fixes
- The embed render toggle now appears in Reading view, not only Live Preview. Thanks @LooselySupervised! (#15)

### Behavior change
- Because rendered frames are now an opaque origin, `localStorage` and `sessionStorage` are unavailable inside rendered HTML (they throw). This is an intentional part of the sandbox isolation.

## Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and place them in `.obsidian/plugins/polyglot-renderer/` in your vault, then reload Obsidian. **This release updates `styles.css` — make sure to replace it, not just `main.js`.**

releases.author: Nimaapr
releases.description:
## What's New
- Interactive HTML support (JavaScript execution, clickable links)
- Relative asset inlining (CSS, JS, images resolve in srcdoc iframes)
- Drag-and-drop HTML files from Finder with destination picker
- Improved HTML paste detection using DOMParser
releases.name: Polyglot Renderer v1.2.0 — Interactive HTML & Asset Inlining

releases.author: Nimaapr
releases.description:
Polyglot Renderer 1.1.0 improves HTML paste handling in Obsidian.

Changes in this release:
- Support pasting multiple HTML files at once
- Save pasted HTML files into the chosen destination and insert them as embeds
- Improve HTML embed rendering flow
- Keep HTML previews sandboxed
- Include packaging and documentation updates for the new paste behavior
releases.name: Polyglot Renderer 1.1.0

releases.author: Nimaapr
releases.description:
Here is a short release note you can use for `1.0.0`:

## Polyglot Renderer 1.0.0

Initial release of Polyglot Renderer for Obsidian.

Features:
- Render fenced `html` code blocks as live sandboxed previews
- Open `.html` and `.htm` files in a custom Obsidian view
- Render `![[file.html]]` embeds inline with a toggle
- Smart paste handling for HTML files and HTML content
- Configurable paste destination and paste behavior settings

Security:
- HTML is rendered in sandboxed iframes
- Scripts and unsafe interactions are blocked by default
releases.name: Polyglot Renderer 1.0.0
